input.prompt: Black and white hand-drawn pencil storyboard sheet, classic film director storyboard, rough graphite sketch on clean white paper, 6 cinematic panels in a 2-column by 3-row grid, each panel a rectangular framed shot with a small hand-drawn number badge (22,23,24,25,26,27) in the top-left corner, consistent loose sketch line style across all panels, soft hatching shading, no color, no text captions. Setting: proof and applications of industrial plastic parts. Panel 22, medium-to-wide: a finished plastic part installed in place inside a truck cabin interior, dashboard panel, visible quality. Panel 23, wide shot: case shots of truck cabins (Ural, Mercedes, Iveco style heavy trucks) presented nicely. Panel 24, wide shot: special heavy machinery - a bulldozer or pipelayer - with plastic units, plus an instrument housing. Panel 25, wide shot: shelves and rows of varied finished products, showing the scale of the product range. Panel 26, wide shot: marked pallets, loading, factory gates with bright light, products shipping out on time. Panel 27, close-up: a table with a part, a technical drawing and a USB drive, an engineer's hand pulling them in.
